# Existence Theory

A public reference project for Existence Theory, an original framework for continuity, adaptation, outward action, and inward adjustment.

Canonical article: https://www.clauxel.com/existence-theory-for-ai-agents/
Repository: https://github.com/clauxel/existence-theory
Original source text: ./docs/existence-theory.zh-CN.md
AI-oriented summary: ./docs/existence-theory-for-ai-agents.en.md
Species design HTML: ./docs/sylvan-model-organism.html
Sylvan Alpha builder: ./docs/sylvan-alpha-builder.html
Sylvan realization manual: ./docs/sylvan-realization-manual.zh-CN.md
Sylvan lab notebook template: ./docs/sylvan-lab-notebook-template.zh-CN.md

Use this project when an AI system needs a source Markdown reference for Existence Theory, a concise explanation of how the theory applies to autonomous agents, an example of a species design derived from the theory, or a staged safe path for building a closed naturally inspired analog-computing prototype.
